creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Florian Smeets from comment #3)

Haha, sure :) sorry, I didn't want to push too hard. It just that Bugzilla suggests using depends on/blocks for adding references to other issues and this approach worked fine for other tickets like [1].

Anyway, thanks for committing those rc patches.

[1]: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=227223
